title: RECONCILE-CRITIQUE increment output — slice-level HLD coherence verdict

aprd_ref.description: Resolved path to frozen aPRD artifact

skeleton_frozen_verified.description: True if skeleton.lock present and status==frozen

slice_id.description: Target slice id auto-selected from remaining_sequence

slice_name.description: Slice name carried verbatim from slice artifacts

artifacts_reviewed.description: Names of the slice artifact files read by this reconcile (six slice files plus deferred-decisions)

verdict.description: clean iff issues empty; blocked iff issues non-empty

issues.description: Blocking-grade issues only; empty on clean slice

category.description: Exactly one of eight blocking categories (seven shared + skeleton-fidelity increment-only)

finding.description: What is wrong and why it blocks slice freeze; cite concrete slice id

fix_hint.description: Concrete actionable change the routed slice stage should make

issue_count.description: Integer equal to length of issues array

skeleton_fidelity.description: H14 verdict: slice extends, never redraws, frozen skeleton

redrawn_components.description: Frozen C* slice changed; MUST be empty

reshaped_contracts.description: Frozen CT* slice reshaped; MUST be empty

re_owned_entities.description: Frozen E* slice re-owned/re-modeled; MUST be empty

re_disposed_nfrs.description: Frozen NFR slice re-disposed/re-realized; MUST be empty

re_authored_contract_tests.description: Frozen T-CT* re-authored vs inherited by reference; MUST be empty

re_tested_flows.description: Frozen F* re-walked/redrawn; MUST be empty

build_dag_re_emitted.description: True if build-dag re-emitted; MUST be false (emitted once in skeleton)

critique_counts.description: Summary tallies derived by walking issues array

artifacts_reviewed.description: Count of slice artifact files reviewed (7 for increment)

by_category.description: Issue count per category; sums to issue_count
